product_name: ToyLet Potty Training Toilet Seat | Toddler Potty Training with Comfy Seat Cover, Tank Storage & Paper Roll Holder | Easy to Empty and Clean | Soft & Comfortable Potty Trainer for Boys & Girls (Pink)

bullets: CHILD DEVELOPMENT: Potty / toilet training reflects a major milestone in a child's development. With this in mind we developed a safe and easy to use training potty for kids of age 1+. ToyLet training potty takes less than 2 minutes to set up, comes equipped with sound module to congratulate your toddler for a job well done, storage for baby wipes and holder for a personal roll of paper.

SPECIAL FEATURES: Tank of the toilet is a neat storage area for your baby wipes or book you can read to your toddler while doing their job. There is NO need for step stool, baby chair or potty-training seat as the ToyLet is perfectly designed for the height of your toddler and is inclusive of all you need. Your child will feel excited and proud to sit on this adult like looking toilet and will progress quickly out of diapers or training pants.
SPLASH GUARD: Front of the potty seat has integrated splash protection for boys. ToyLet is easy to stow away & a great travel system to use while teaching your baby potty training.

EASY TO CLEAN: Removable seat of the ToyLet is designed to be a bowl and a potty seat at the same time. Perfect for covering up the smell while you congraturlate your child for a job well done. Potty training your toddler with ToyLet is easier and will feel more natural than use of squatty potty as it looks, feels, and is designed to resemble a real toilet / potty.

COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: ToyLet potty training system is designed and produced in Europe for toddlers 18m +. ToyLet is the only training potty to incorporate a seat cover to make potty training a smell free experience. No additional baby items or toddler chair is required as ToyLet has all your child needs in potty training.
content.keywords: Potty toilet training seat baby kids toddler for portable chair comfy travel my fist squatty with girls trainer bum boy girl potties toddlers 1-year-old 2 years toilets babies practicing
content.description: The ToyLet Training Toilet Potty helps make potty training feel natural by giving toddlers a mini toilet that looks and feels like the real thing. Designed for toddlers 18 months and older, it features a comfortable removable seat, lid/cover to help reduce odours, integrated splash protection, storage space for wipes or small books, and a toilet-paper roll holder. The included sound module congratulates your child after use, helping make potty training more positive and encouraging. Compact, easy to set up, and toddler-height, ToyLet provides an all-in-one potty training system without the need for a separate step stool, potty seat, or toddler chair.

compliance.choking_hazard: WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD--Small parts. Not intended for children under 3 yrs
